name: Cupos (Ground Beef Peruvian Dish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil cabbage for about 30 minutes.
2. Peel and prepare the cabbage leaves.
3. Combine ground beef and rice in the prepared cabbage.
4. Mix tomato sauce, chopped onions, and bay leaves together.
5. Cook the ground beef until it turns brown.
6. Stir the sauce and meat mixture well.
7. Cut sausages into small pieces.
8. Allow everything to cook for 45 minutes before serving.
